data.name: Vinyl record library — Northern Soul and Motown
data.description: Approximately 800 Northern Soul and Motown 45s collected over 40 years. Includes rare UK pressings. Stored in custom library cabinets in the back bedroom at 14 Ashfield Road, Leeds.
data.disposalWishes: Please keep together — do not split and sell individually. Contact Soul Source forum members first.
data.specialistDealerNotes: Soul Brother Records, Brixton — specialist in Northern Soul. Goldmine Records, Manchester. Avoid general eBay lot sellers.
data.notes: Insurance policy with Hiscox, ref HX-VINYL-2024. Photos in Google Drive folder 'Record Collection'.

tests.description: valid — Japanese woodblock print collection with auction disposal

data.name: Edo-period woodblock prints — Hiroshige and Hokusai
data.description: Collection of 23 Edo-period ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Assembled by Haruki Tanaka over 35 years. Documented in a handwritten catalogue stored with the prints.
data.specialistDealerNotes: Christie's Tokyo have expressed interest. Contact Yamada-san at Mitsukoshi Gallery as secondary option.
data.disposalWishes: Should be sold as a complete collection. The pieces were acquired together and have greater value as a set.
